supported platforms

methods.name: apolo_extras.image_builder.ImageBuilder.__init__
documentation:
Builds and pushes docker image to the platform.
    By default, build  happens on the platform, using Kaniko tool,
    unless --local is specified.

Args:
    client (apolo_sdk.Client): platform client instance of apolo-sdk,
        authenticated to the destination cluster
    extra_registry_auths (Sequence[DockerConfigAuth], optional):
        Sequence of extra docker container registry auth credits,
        useful if base image(s) hidden under private registry(es).
        Defaults to ().
    verbose (bool, optional): Whether to set Kaniko's verbosity to DEBUG.
        Defaults to False.

methods.name: apolo_extras.data.common.ArchiveType.get_type
documentation: Determine archive type from file extension

Int Flag for archive types

Supports fuzzy checks:
\>>> assert ArchiveType.TAR_GZ == ArchiveType.TAR
\>>> assert (ArchiveType.GZ | ArchiveType.ZIP) == ArchiveType.SUPPORTED

methods.name: apolo_extras.data.common.DataUrlType.get_type
documentation: Detect UrlType by checking url schema

Enum type for handling source/destination types

Supports comparisons between particular type and its category:
\>>> assert UrlType.GCS == UrlType.CLOUD
\>>> assert UrlType.LOCAL == (~UrlType.UNSUPPORTED)

classes.name: apolo_extras.data.common.Resource

methods.name: apolo_extras.data.common.Resource.filename
documentation:
Filename to which the url is pointing

For local urls, this is obtained from os.path.split
For platform urls this is obtained by detecting cluster/org/project name,
  if the url points to a project/org/cluster (without trailing slash),
  the filename will be None.
For all other urls - the last part of self.url.parts is returned

methods.name: apolo_extras.data.common.Resource.disk_id_and_path
documentation:
For disk resources - full id of the disk
(disk://{cluster}[/org]/project/id) and the path on disk

Fails if self._client is None.

Base class for copiers, which can be executed locally

classes.name: apolo_extras.data.local.LocalToLocalCopier

methods.name: apolo_extras.data.local.LocalToLocalCopier.perform_copy
documentation:
Perform copy from local fs to local fs.

Delegates copy implementation to appropriate LocalFSCopier.
Uses ArchiveManager to handle compression/extraction.

Copier, that can copy data from and to local storage

Supports compression and extraction.

classes.name: apolo_extras.data.local.LocalToCloudCopier

methods.name: apolo_extras.data.local.LocalToCloudCopier.perform_copy
documentation:
Perform copy from local to cloud.

Delegates copy implementation to appropriate Copier (S3, Azure, GCS, Web).
Uses ArchiveManager to handle compression/extraction.

Copier, that can copy data from local storage to a storage bucket

Supports compression and extraction (temp_dir is used to store intermediate results)

classes.name: apolo_extras.data.local.CloudToLocalCopier
documentation:
Copier, that can copy data from cloud storage to local fs

Supports compression and extraction (temp_dir is used to store intermediate results)

modules.name: apolo_extras.data.remote
documentation: Module for copying files by running neu.ro jobs

functions.name: apolo_extras.data.remote._map_into_volumes
documentation:
Map urls for platform storage into volume mounts.

Returns (patched_source: str, patched_destination: str, volumes: List[str]),
where patched_source and patched_destination are mount points for
source and destination if they belong to platform storage
and the same urls otherwise.

functions.name: apolo_extras.data.remote._map_resource_into_volume
documentation:
Map storage or disk resource into volume specification string
and patch such url into a local path inside a container.

storage: urls are mounted into storage_mount_prefix.
    If the url points to a file and mount_files is True,
    it is directly mounted as-is; is mount_files is False,
    parent directory is mounted instead (useful for
    mounting destination, as empy volumes are mounted as directories).

disk: urls are mounted into disk_mount_prefix.
    If the path on disk is provided, patch url into that
    subfolder of disk_mount prefix.

Other urls are left as-is.

functions.name: apolo_extras.data.remote._build_data_copy_command
documentation: Build a apolo-extras data cp command

Create `RemoteJobConfig` for a neu.ro copy job.

classes.name: apolo_extras.data.remote.RemoteCopier

Can copy data between neu.ro storage: or disk: and cloud storage.
